final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original abstract expressionist artwork for contemporary gallery exhibition.

Style/medium: Abstract expressionism, bold gestural painting, inspired by Willem de Kooning and Joan Mitchell, energetic brushwork, non-representational
Composition: dynamic asymmetrical balance, sweeping diagonal movements, layered overlapping forms, no focal point, all-over painting approach
Subject: pure abstraction through color and gesture, emotional intensity conveyed through mark-making, no recognizable figures or objects
Scene/backdrop: raw canvas texture visible, paint drips and splatters integrated, immersive scale suggesting gallery wall presentation
Lighting/mood: dramatic contrast between saturated color fields and neutral ground, sense of spontaneous creative energy and raw emotion
Color palette: bold clashing hues — cadmium red against ultramarine blue, hot orange with cool turquoise, yellow ochre accents, high chroma saturation
Materials/textures: thick impasto strokes, visible brush marks, drips and splatters, layered paint application, tactile surface quality
Constraints: must remain entirely non-representational, no hidden figures or objects, suitable for white-cube gallery display
Avoid: recognizable imagery, geometric precision, digital smoothness, stock art aesthetic, decorative patterns, pastel tones
